---
title: "Title TBD"
---

## Overview

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under Construction

## Learning Objectives

{{< fa screwdriver-wrench >}} TBD

## Preparation

{{< fa screwdriver-wrench >}} TBD



{{< include topics/viz-synthesis.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/viz-exploration.qmd >}}
{{< include activities/data-sleuth_viz.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/viz-draw.qmd >}}
{{< include activities/draw-graph.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/viz-ggplot2-core.qmd >}}
{{< include activities/make-graph-p01.qmd >}}
{{< include activities/make-graph-p02.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/viz-ggplot2-multipanel.qmd >}}
{{< include activities/make-graph-p03.qmd >}}




{{< include topics/proj-mgmt-def.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/proj-mgmt-start.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/proj-mgmt-scope.qmd >}}
